scope.subject: storage-backed workflow artifact recognition
scope.describes: whether contract-shaped workflow artifacts are observable at the expected storage location for the current task context
does_not_describe: whether the internal workflow node was semantically completed
whether the workflow was intentionally bypassed
whether the task is compliant or non-compliant
whether a risk or gate verdict is justified

metric.name: observation_coverage
metric.description: fraction of expected artifacts that are currently recognized under the entry-layer contract

consumer_defaults.combination_rule: observation lane must not, alone or via observation-only combination inference, produce compliance, intent, or policy-violation conclusions
consumer_defaults.recomposition_rule: legal observation surfaces must not be recomposed into a pseudo-policy, attention-priority, severity, or escalation view

failure_source_class.rule: failure_source_class may explain why recognition failed, but it must not be used as a direct policy or enforcement switch

recognized.meaning: a recognizable artifact was observed and matched the current contract context
allowed_interpretations: artifact metadata and payload are recognizable for this context

missing.meaning: no artifact was observed at the expected storage location

incomplete.meaning: an artifact was observed but the minimum envelope or payload fields are absent
allowed_interpretations: artifact trace exists but recognition preconditions are incomplete
artifact storage alone is insufficient for recognition

stale.meaning: an artifact was observed but is outside the freshness window for the current task context
allowed_interpretations: artifact trace exists but freshness linkage is weak
artifact may describe older work rather than the current task

unverifiable.meaning: an artifact was observed but provenance, schema, scope, or time linkage does not justify recognition
allowed_interpretations: artifact trace exists but trust linkage is insufficient
recognition cannot safely rely on the observed artifact
